Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores a fast string representation of the Git hash for version control.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves the speed of retrieving version information for updates.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes the way timestamps are converted to strings for faster processing.
Changed_Other.purpose: Reduces lag and improves the speed of time-related functions in games, enhancing overall player experience.

Removed_Other.name: DFFlagDontRemoveNonLocalChildrenWithMRD_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Prevents the removal of non-local children in the staged model replication process.
Removed_Other.purpose: Ensures that important game elements remain intact during updates, enhancing stability.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagFoundationToastNotification_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Introduces toast notifications for important updates.
Removed_Other.purpose: Keeps players informed about game events or updates in real-time.

Removed_Camera/UI.name: FFlagUIEditorNoPartSelection_Staged
Removed_Camera/UI.mechanism: Disables part selection in the UI editor.
Removed_Camera/UI.purpose: Allows users to focus on editing UI without distractions from parts.
